description: Sample issues used in the MindsHub demo. Use this as your linked repo or reference for the recording.

open_issues.title: Borrow checker error when passing Vec<String> into async closure
open_issues.body: Getting E0502 when I try to pass a mutable reference into an async block. Tried wrapping in Arc<Mutex<>> but still confused about the right pattern.

open_issues.title: Compilation fails on Windows with MSVC toolchain
open_issues.body: Works fine on Linux/macOS but fails to compile on Windows using the MSVC toolchain. Error is in the `cc` crate. Steps to reproduce included.

open_issues.title: tokio::spawn panics with 'called outside of Tokio runtime'
open_issues.body: Trying to spawn tasks in a library function but keep hitting this panic. Not clear how to propagate the runtime context.

open_issues.title: Documentation unclear on lifetime annotations in trait bounds
open_issues.body: The examples in the README don't explain when you need 'static vs named lifetimes in trait bounds. A few more examples would help.

open_issues.title: serde_json deserialization fails silently on missing optional fields
open_issues.body: Expected Option<T> to be None when the field is missing, but getting a deserialization error instead. Seems like a config issue but not sure.

open_issues.title: Feature request: add CLI flag to disable color output
open_issues.body: Running in CI pipelines where ANSI color codes break log parsing. Would love a --no-color flag or CLICOLOR=0 support.

open_issues.title: Async trait methods not working with dyn dispatch
open_issues.body: Tried using async fn in a trait with Box<dyn MyTrait> but the compiler won't allow it. Is async-trait crate the only solution?

note: This is demo data. When recording, you can use a real Rust repo from your GitHub account, or link this data file to MindsHub as a reference.
